title: Gothofreda dombeyana

The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, wounds, and respiratory issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Gothofreda dombeyana is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in the production of herbal syrups and ointments.
